title: rubus cuspidiger
intro: Rubus cuspidiger, a species of raspberry native to China, is a type of bramble that grows in the mountainous regions of the country. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus cuspidiger are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Rubus cuspidiger can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
